fast-team-explorer.name: Fast Team Explorer
fast-team-explorer.description: You shine in fast-paced group games and love sharing the moment with teammates.
fast-team-explorer.flavor: Quick feet, sharp eyes, big team energy.

precision-challenger.name: Precision Challenger
precision-challenger.description: You love sharpening a single skill until it clicks — focused, careful, and steady.
precision-challenger.flavor: One target. One swing. One perfect line.

balance-rhythm-creator.name: Balance & Rhythm Creator
balance-rhythm-creator.description: Your body finds the beat. You move with grace and turn motion into expression.

outdoor-endurance-adventurer.name: Outdoor Endurance Adventurer
outdoor-endurance-adventurer.description: You feel best on long trails and open paths — moving steadily, breathing deeply.
outdoor-endurance-adventurer.flavor: Big sky, long miles, easy mind.

power-builder.name: Power Builder
power-builder.description: You like the feel of working hard and getting stronger one rep at a time.
power-builder.flavor: Lift, push, repeat. Stronger every week.

strategy-mover.name: Strategy Mover
strategy-mover.description: You love games where reading the play matters as much as running fast.
strategy-mover.flavor: Think a step ahead. Then make the move.

calm-focus-mover.name: Calm & Focus Mover
calm-focus-mover.description: You move best when it’s quiet — slow, mindful, and steady on your feet.

skill-trick-explorer.name: Skill & Trick Explorer
skill-trick-explorer.description: You like learning tricks, mixing combinations, and finding new ways to move.
skill-trick-explorer.flavor: New trick today. Better one tomorrow.

water-flow-explorer.name: Water Flow Explorer
water-flow-explorer.description: You feel calm and curious when you’re moving in the water.
water-flow-explorer.flavor: Water teaches the body to flow.

flexible-performer.name: Flexible Performer
flexible-performer.description: Your body bends and stretches; you love showing what it can do.

yoga.name: Yoga
yoga.description: Gentle stretching and balance poses that help you breathe and focus.
yoga.fit: Calm focus and steady balance — yoga gives both.

tai-chi.name: Tai Chi
tai-chi.description: Slow, flowing movements that build balance and quiet attention.
tai-chi.fit: A calm flow that fits your slow-and-steady rhythm.

martial-arts.name: Martial Arts
martial-arts.description: Step-by-step routines that build strength, balance, and self-control.
martial-arts.fit: Structured drills with focus, balance, and respectful sparring.

dance.name: Dance
dance.description: Move to the music — many styles, lots of expression.
dance.fit: Rhythm, expression, and freedom in every step.

ballet.name: Ballet
ballet.description: A classic, precise art of balance, poise, and storytelling through movement.
ballet.fit: Precise shapes, beautiful balance, expressive lines.

gymnastics.name: Gymnastics
gymnastics.description: Tumbling, jumps, and balance skills on mats and apparatus.
gymnastics.fit: Bend, balance, leap — gymnastics rewards every kind of body skill.

swimming.name: Swimming
swimming.description: Move through water using strokes you can practice at any pace.
swimming.fit: Water gives a steady, calm space to find your rhythm.

surfing.name: Surfing
surfing.description: Stand on a board and ride ocean waves.
surfing.fit: Wave-by-wave balance and the joy of being on water.

kayaking.name: Kayaking
kayaking.description: Paddle a small boat on lakes, rivers, or calm sea.
kayaking.fit: Quiet water, long strokes, easy outdoor adventure.

rock-climbing.name: Rock Climbing
rock-climbing.description: Climb walls and routes using grip, balance, and problem-solving.
rock-climbing.fit: Strength meets focus on every route you choose.

hiking.name: Hiking
hiking.description: Walk trails outside — short loops or long adventures.
hiking.fit: Long paths, fresh air, and easy company with your own thoughts.

running.name: Running
running.description: Move at your own pace — track, trail, or treadmill.
running.fit: Steady miles that match your endurance and energy.

cycling.name: Cycling
cycling.description: Ride a bike on roads, trails, or paths.
cycling.fit: Outdoor distance, your speed, your route.

skateboarding.name: Skateboarding
skateboarding.description: Roll, push, and learn tricks on a board.
skateboarding.fit: Free-style balance and your own creative flow.

parkour.name: Parkour
parkour.description: Jump, climb, and move smoothly through obstacles.
parkour.fit: Freedom, balance, and bursts of energy through every move.

football.name: Football (Soccer)
football.description: Team sport played with feet on a large field.
football.fit: A team game with running room and steady stamina.

basketball.name: Basketball
basketball.description: Fast team game played on a court with a hoop.
basketball.fit: Quick bursts, team plays, and indoor or outdoor energy.

volleyball.name: Volleyball
volleyball.description: Team game where players keep a ball off the ground using hands.
volleyball.fit: Sharp coordination and bursts of teamwork.

tennis.name: Tennis
tennis.description: Hit a ball back and forth across a net — solo or doubles.
tennis.fit: A focused rally where coordination and structure matter.

badminton.name: Badminton
badminton.description: Hit a shuttlecock over a net, indoors or out.
badminton.fit: Quick reactions in a tidy structured game.

table-tennis.name: Table Tennis
table-tennis.description: A small, fast indoor net game.
table-tennis.fit: Speed, focus, and small precise moves.

baseball.name: Baseball
baseball.description: Classic outdoor team sport with bats, mitts, and bases.
baseball.fit: Outdoor team play with structured roles.

archery.name: Archery
archery.description: Shoot arrows at a target using bow and steady focus.
archery.fit: Quiet focus and one careful shot at a time.

fencing.name: Fencing
fencing.description: A classic sport of speed, focus, and structured duels.
fencing.fit: Fast footwork in a tidy structured frame.

boxing.name: Boxing
boxing.description: Step-by-step training that builds strength, footwork, and timing.
boxing.fit: Power, drills, and focused energy on the bag.

weightlifting.name: Weightlifting
weightlifting.description: Build strength with progressive lifts and structured plans.
weightlifting.fit: Pure structured strength work, one rep at a time.

rowing.name: Rowing
rowing.description: Pull oars together as a team on the water.
rowing.fit: Team rhythm and long endurance on water.

ultimate-frisbee.name: Ultimate Frisbee
ultimate-frisbee.description: Outdoor team game with a flying disc.
ultimate-frisbee.fit: Teamwork with a freeform, outdoor twist.

capoeira.name: Capoeira
capoeira.description: Brazilian movement art that mixes dance, music, and acrobatics.
capoeira.fit: Rhythm, expression, and balance all at once.

trampoline.name: Trampoline
trampoline.description: Bounce, twist, and learn aerial tricks.
trampoline.fit: Bursts of expression and balance on every bounce.

ice-skating.name: Ice Skating
ice-skating.description: Glide on ice — figure skating, recreational, or learn-to-skate.
ice-skating.fit: Smooth balance with rhythm and grace.

skiing.name: Skiing
skiing.description: Slide down snowy slopes with practice or instruction.
skiing.fit: Outdoor balance and energy in winter snow.

bouldering.name: Bouldering
bouldering.description: Climb shorter walls without a rope — short bursts of focused effort.
bouldering.fit: Strong grip, careful balance, indoor problem-solving.

results.exploratoryDisclaimer: This is a starting point, not a final answer — try a few and see what feels right.
results.revealCtaSubtitle: We'll show you a handful of activities that match your style.
